MASTER CALENDAR COURT

No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF PACIFICO SOLIS Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is Off calendar per notice by the moving party. Judge Pro tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Ford Motor Company'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christine Lee of Strategic Legal Practices law firm (310.929.4900) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, H. Paul Efstratis of LeClairRyan LLP (415.913.4957) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is called concurrently with related action, CGC-16-551717, Alabi vs. Ford Motor Company ET AL. Court inquires and plaintiff counsel indicates she is relying on discovery rule timeliness. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Defendant Ford Motor Company's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED with 20 days leave to amend. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to be heard on October 13, 2016 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 302 before Judge Stewart.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

Angela Dailey, of the Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4931, for plaintiffs;
Kristina Lambert, of LeClair Ryan LLP, Tel. 415.391.7111, for defendants, appearing via CourtCall;

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorneys, Angela Dailey and Christine Lee of Strategic Legal Practices PC (310-929-4900) appear for plaintiff/opposing party, Pacifico Solis

Attorney, H. Paul Efstratis of LeClair Ryan LLP (415-391-7111 ext. 4963) appears telephonically for defendant/moving party, Ford Motor Company

Court issues tentative ruling to sustain with leave to amend. Court states findings as set forth in the transcript of the court reporter The matter is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)
